TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 2025 mihcaan Taypei nai' ku hicahica nu sapiedisan a kawaw 2025 == 2025 mihcaan 12 bulad 19 demiad tu sangsangdep, Taywan Taypei Ci-yun-cen Taypei pikacawan ilabu atu Cung-san pikacawan hekal nu timul tipan nu pisiwbayan sikawaw tu nai' ku canancanan nu sapiedisaw a tademaw. ina miedisay ci Cen-wen-suo itida i Cung-san kitidaan a Cen-an-tun-lu, Lin-sen-pei-lu, atu Cung-ce a kitidaan nu sasalamaan mi'suy tu luma' mituduh; kilul sa tayda i Cei-yun Taypei pikacawan tu M tatahekalan tu sasaay nu dadanan miwit tu siwacaay nu lacuan, miala tu katini' mitala' tu tademaw, caay ka tenes malimad taydan nida i Cung-san cen a Cen-pin sakaudip tu timul tipan nu capian matulin a miedi's, sadikuday katuud ku kincal a milawa' cinidaan sa saipakayda i pisiwbayan tu tungduh sedaysa maheti mapatay. 2025ŚĻī12śúą19śó•Śāćśôö, M . namaka 2024 mihcaan 1 bulad milingatu mikiyaku tina kawawan. sapiedis nida mikilul tu 2014 nikudan, ina Taypei liklik idaw aca ku tabakiay nu mi'disay a kawaw, pasu lalabu nu luma' pulung han sasepat ku mapatayay, sabaw cacay ku madukaay. ina Taypei cie-yun kusi itida i sikawaway nu kitidaan patideng tu kalaluman nu kawawan, papatayda tu binacadan mihinum, idaw ku duma nu binacadan tayda i cen-pin nan-si pisiwbayan patayda tub alu, miinuli mihinum tu mapatayay. ci Cen-wen "1998 mihcaan ‚Äď2025 mihcaan 12 bulad 19 demiad", mihcaan nida 27 ku mihcaan, aenengan itida i Taw-yen se Yen-mei kitidaan. picudadan nida tu kuo-cung a tayda i kaw-cung sumad satu ku wayway nidan, hina sakamu tu " mitala tu tademaw", " alahican musakamu tu anu mahida patayen nu maku ci nida sa" sasakamuen. pikaw-cungan micuda tu yen-pin kakanen a cudadan, micudad tu tabakiay nu Kuo-li-hu-wi ce-sun-ke, saan ku cacudadan yu micudad itini " caay kahicahica", kapah ku tisu caay a kacuwacuwa ku wayway, nai' ku kiluk i cacudadan, mahedek satu micudad tu tabakiay namilabutu sakalecabay atu saydan nu nikalecabayan. 2021 mihcaan 8 bulad, malahitay tu kungung nu nai'ay nu dingsingan, nika itini i 2022 pihibangan nu hitay mukan tupah alesan nu hitay paduma tu taw. namala mikunliay tu niyadu'ay nu matatungdutay nu lumaan tu paw-ci, caay ka kapah ku wayway pikulian, sawni masasukaynah atu mikuliay nu tademaw, tusa abulad ku nipikulian paalesan tu nu kakulian. nasaan tu kaka a musakamu " kanahatu u kaka nu maku kisu, acay kaku pipatay tisuwan" haw sa ku kamu a patalaw, nikahidaan sisa caay tu kasasuadih, pikikungan nu kaka musakamu ku kaka ci naan nida amana sakamui tu saba haw sa. ŚľĶśĖá(1998ŚĻī‚ÄĒ2025ŚĻī12śúą19śó•), . nikaydaan nu kawaw šļčšĽ∂Á∂ďťĀé 2025 mihcaan 12 bulad 16 demiad makautubay ci nida misapapa'ngaw tu Ta-tun atu Cung-san niyadu'an. 17 demiad misuy cinida i tapiingan nu Cung-san tisiybaan nu Cin-huy liwkan, micapi tu Cen-pi nan-si lima a kunce an. 18 demiad Cen-pi nan-si pisiwbayay misamawmaw a miadih, palita tu sakatayda i tungdud misasing t usen-tan nu dinkian. 2025ŚĻī12śúą16 . 19 demiad 15 tuki 40 widi, tayda nida i Cung-san ciu a Cen-an-tun-lu, Lin-sen-pei-lu, atu Cung-san-ciu aidangan mi'suy sa palamal, matuduh ku nipadeng i dadan nu utubayan, kadideng atu damut. Sidikuc tu lumeniay a dikucan, idaw ku sakayduku nu sapipu' tu bihit itida i 17 tuki 22 widi, tahikal i Tay-pei cie-yun Tay-pei tisyaba M7 atu M8 sakatahekal nu sasaay a dadanan, sipakayda nida i kabung nida miala tu sakasiwacaah nu lacuan, ku mangalay mitekin a palamal. idaw ku cacayay nu makaydaay muculil a tademaw ci Yi sin-sen puluan nida, inipuluan nida sa, alaw malikat ku i kabangan nida nu simalan, matala' nu tanayuay a katinian, patayda han cinida i Tay-ta paising, sadikuday tada pihaceng tu ku duka mapatay. 19śó•15śôā40ŚąÜŤĶ∑, M7ŚŹäM8 . miliyas ci nida tu Taypei tisyaba, talumaen nida tayda i Nan-cin-si-lu a liwkangan; 18 tuki 38 widi itida i Cung-san-cen hikal miwait tu siwacahay nu lacuan, paceba satu mipacuk mipatay tu muculilay a tademaw. kasicumian satu, taydan nida milaliw i cen-pin nan-si pisiwbayan matulin a mikawaw. lawaan tu nu kincal a midakep, sipakayda nida i tungdud nu pisiwbayan seday satu a mahitai, kilul sa pataydan i padekuan pakakalah a pakaudip, i 19 tuki 42 widi mapatay, idaw i tida ku nihulakan nida tu dikun tu nikahetikan nida. .
S.PHON: == **** mińß ¶aan tajp…ôi nai Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a nu sapi…ôdisan a kawaw **** == **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad tu saŇčsaŇčd…ôp, tajwan tajp…ôi ¶i-jun- ¶…ôn tajp…ôi pika ¶awan ir~…ĺabu atu ¶uŇč-san pika ¶awan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu timur~…ĺ tipan nu pisiwbajan sikawaw tu nai Ē~ ° ku ¶anan ¶anan nu sapi…ôdisaw a tad…ômaw. ina mi…ôdisaj ¶i ¶…ôn-w…ôn-suo itida i ¶uŇč-san kitidaan a ¶…ôn-an-tun-r~…ĺu, r~…ĺin-s…ôn-p…ôi-r~…ĺu, atu ¶uŇč- ¶…ô a kitidaan nu sasar~…ĺamaan mi Ē~ °suj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mituduńß; kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tajda i ¶…ôi-jun tajp…ôi pika ¶awan tu m tatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sasaaj nu dadanan miwit tu siwa ¶aaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, miar~…ĺa tu katini Ē~ ° mitar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs mar~…ĺimad tajdan nida i ¶uŇč-san ¶…ôn a ¶…ôn-pin sakaudip tu timur~…ĺ tipan nu ¶apian matur~…ĺin a mi…ôdi Ē~ °s, sadikudaj katuud ku kin ¶ar~…ĺ a mir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° ¶inidaan sa saipakajda i pisiwbajan tu tuŇčduńß s…ôdajsa mańß…ôti mapataj. *************, m . namaka **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad mir~…ĺiŇčatu mikijaku tina kawawan. sapi…ôdis nida mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu **** nikudan, ina tajp…ôi r~…ĺikr~…ĺik idaw a ¶a ku tabakiaj nu mi Ē~ °disaj a kawaw, pasu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan sas…ôpat ku mapatajaj, sabaw ¶a ¶aj ku madukaaj. ina tajp…ôi ¶i…ô-jun kusi itida i sikawawaj nu kitidaan patid…ôŇč tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu kawawan, papatajda tu bina ¶adan mińßinum, idaw ku duma nu bina ¶adan tajda i ¶…ôn-pin nan-si pisiwbajan patajda tub ar~…ĺu, miinur~…ĺi mińßinum tu mapatajaj. ¶i ¶…ôn-w…ôn "**** mińß ¶aan ***** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad", mińß ¶aan nida ** ku mińß ¶aan, a…ôn…ôŇčan itida i taw-j…ôn s…ô j…ôn-m…ôi kitidaan. pi ¶udadan nida tu kuo- ¶uŇč a tajda i kaw- ¶uŇč sumad satu ku wajwaj nidan, ńßina sakamu tu " mitar~…ĺa tu tad…ômaw", " ar~…ĺańßi ¶an musakamu tu anu mańßida pataj…ôn nu maku ¶i nida sa" sasakamu…ôn. pikaw- ¶uŇčan mi ¶uda tu j…ôn-pin kakan…ôn a ¶udadan, mi ¶udad tu tabakiaj nu kuo-r~…ĺi-ńßu-wi ¶…ô-sun-k…ô, saan ku ¶a ¶udadan ju mi ¶udad itini " ¶aaj kańßi ¶ańßi ¶a", kapańß ku tisu ¶aaj a ka ¶uwa ¶uwa ku wajwaj, nai Ē~ ° ku kir~…ĺuk i ¶a ¶udadan, mańß…ôd…ôk satu mi ¶udad tu tabakiaj namir~…ĺabutu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj atu sajdan nu nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan. **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad, mar~…ĺańßitaj tu kuŇčuŇč nu nai Ē~ °aj nu diŇčsiŇčan, nika itini i **** pińßibaŇčan nu ńßitaj mukan tupańß ar~…ĺ…ôsan nu ńßitaj paduma tu taw. namar~…ĺa mikunr~…ĺiaj tu nijadu Ē~ °aj nu matatuŇčdutaj nu r~…ĺumaan tu paw- ¶i, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku wajwaj pikur~…ĺian, sawni masasukajnańß atu mikur~…ĺiaj nu tad…ômaw, tusa abur~…ĺad ku nipikur~…ĺian paar~…ĺ…ôsan tu nu kakur~…ĺian. nasaan tu kaka a musakamu " kanańßatu u kaka nu maku kisu, a ¶aj kaku pipataj tisuwan" ńßaw sa ku kamu a patar~…ĺaw, nikańßidaan sisa ¶aaj tu kasasuadińß, pikikuŇčan nu kaka musakamu ku kaka ¶i naan nida amana sakamui tu saba ńßaw sa. **(*****************), . nikajdaan nu kawaw **** **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad makautubaj ¶i nida misapapa Ē~ °Ňčaw tu ta-tun atu ¶uŇč-san nijadu Ē~ °an. ** d…ômiad misuj ¶inida i tapiiŇčan nu ¶uŇč-san tisijbaan nu ¶in-ńßuj r~…ĺiwkan, mi ¶api tu ¶…ôn-pi nan-si r~…ĺima a kun ¶…ô an. ** d…ômiad ¶…ôn-pi nan-si pisiwbajaj misamawmaw a miadińß, par~…ĺita tu sakatajda i tuŇčdud misasiŇč t us…ôn-tan nu dinkian. ********** . ** d…ômiad ** tuki ** widi, tajda nida i ¶uŇč-san ¶iu a ¶…ôn-an-tun-r~…ĺu, r~…ĺin-s…ôn-p…ôi-r~…ĺu, atu ¶uŇč-san- ¶iu aidaŇčan mi Ē~ °suj sa par~…ĺamar~…ĺ, matuduńß ku nipad…ôŇč i dadan nu utubajan, kadid…ôŇč atu damut. sidiku ¶ tu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a diku ¶an, idaw ku sakajduku nu sapipu Ē~ ° tu bińßit itida i ** tuki ** widi, tańßikar~…ĺ i taj-p…ôi ¶i…ô-jun taj-p…ôi tisjaba m* atu m* sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sasaaj a dadanan, sipakajda nida i kabuŇč nida miar~…ĺa tu sakasiwa ¶aańß nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, ku maŇčar~…ĺaj mit…ôkin a par~…ĺamar~…ĺ. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu makajdaaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a tad…ômaw ¶i ji sin-s…ôn pur~…ĺuan nida, inipur~…ĺuan nida sa, ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺikat ku i kabaŇčan nida nu simar~…ĺan, matar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu tanajuaj a katinian, patajda ńßan ¶inida i taj-ta paisiŇč, sadikudaj tada pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu ku duka mapataj. **********, m**m* . mir~…ĺijas ¶i nida tu tajp…ôi tisjaba, tar~…ĺuma…ôn nida tajda i nan- ¶in-si-r~…ĺu a r~…ĺiwkaŇčan; ** tuki ** widi itida i ¶uŇč-san- ¶…ôn ńßikar~…ĺ miwait tu siwa ¶ańßaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, pa ¶…ôba satu mipa ¶uk mipataj tu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. kasi ¶umian satu, tajdan nida mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw i ¶…ôn-pin nan-si pisiwbajan matur~…ĺin a mikawaw. r~…ĺawaan tu nu kin ¶ar~…ĺ a midak…ôp, sipakajda nida i tuŇčdud nu pisiwbajan s…ôdaj satu a mańßitai, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa patajdan i pad…ôkuan pakakar~…ĺańß a pakaudip, i ** tuki ** widi mapataj, idaw i tida ku nińßur~…ĺakan nida tu dikun tu nikańß…ôtikan nida. .
S.FORM: == 2025 mihcaan Taypei nai' ku hicahica nu sapiedisan a kawaw 2025 == 2025 mihcaan 12 bulad 19 demiad tu sangsangdep, Taywan Taypei Ci-yun-cen Taypei pikacawan ilabu atu Cung-san pikacawan hekal nu timul tipan nu pisiwbayan sikawaw tu nai' ku canancanan nu sapiedisaw a tademaw. ina miedisay ci Cen-wen-suo itida i Cung-san kitidaan a Cen-an-tun-lu, Lin-sen-pei-lu, atu Cung-ce a kitidaan nu sasalamaan mi'suy tu luma' mituduh; kilul sa tayda i Cei-yun Taypei pikacawan tu M tatahekalan tu sasaay nu dadanan miwit tu siwacaay nu lacuan, miala tu katini' mitala' tu tademaw, caay ka tenes malimad taydan nida i Cung-san cen a Cen-pin sakaudip tu timul tipan nu capian matulin a miedi's, sadikuday katuud ku kincal a milawa' cinidaan sa saipakayda i pisiwbayan tu tungduh sedaysa maheti mapatay. 2025ŚĻī12śúą19śó•Śāćśôö, M . namaka 2024 mihcaan 1 bulad milingatu mikiyaku tina kawawan. sapiedis nida mikilul tu 2014 nikudan, ina Taypei liklik idaw aca ku tabakiay nu mi'disay a kawaw, pasu lalabu nu luma' pulung han sasepat ku mapatayay, sabaw cacay ku madukaay. ina Taypei cie-yun kusi itida i sikawaway nu kitidaan patideng tu kalaluman nu kawawan, papatayda tu binacadan mihinum, idaw ku duma nu binacadan tayda i cen-pin nan-si pisiwbayan patayda tub alu, miinuli mihinum tu mapatayay. ci Cen-wen "1998 mihcaan ‚Äď2025 mihcaan 12 bulad 19 demiad", mihcaan nida 27 ku mihcaan, aenengan itida i Taw-yen se Yen-mei kitidaan. picudadan nida tu kuo-cung a tayda i kaw-cung sumad satu ku wayway nidan, hina sakamu tu " mitala tu tademaw", " alahican musakamu tu anu mahida patayen nu maku ci nida sa" sasakamuen. pikaw-cungan micuda tu yen-pin kakanen a cudadan, micudad tu tabakiay nu Kuo-li-hu-wi ce-sun-ke, saan ku cacudadan yu micudad itini " caay kahicahica", kapah ku tisu caay a kacuwacuwa ku wayway, nai' ku kiluk i cacudadan, mahedek satu micudad tu tabakiay namilabutu sakalecabay atu saydan nu nikalecabayan. 2021 mihcaan 8 bulad, malahitay tu kungung nu nai'ay nu dingsingan, nika itini i 2022 pihibangan nu hitay mukan tupah alesan nu hitay paduma tu taw. namala mikunliay tu niyadu'ay nu matatungdutay nu lumaan tu paw-ci, caay ka kapah ku wayway pikulian, sawni masasukaynah atu mikuliay nu tademaw, tusa abulad ku nipikulian paalesan tu nu kakulian. nasaan tu kaka a musakamu " kanahatu u kaka nu maku kisu, acay kaku pipatay tisuwan" haw sa ku kamu a patalaw, nikahidaan sisa caay tu kasasuadih, pikikungan nu kaka musakamu ku kaka ci naan nida amana sakamui tu saba haw sa. ŚľĶśĖá(1998ŚĻī‚ÄĒ2025ŚĻī12śúą19śó•), . nikaydaan nu kawaw šļčšĽ∂Á∂ďťĀé 2025 mihcaan 12 bulad 16 demiad makautubay ci nida misapapa'ngaw tu Ta-tun atu Cung-san niyadu'an. 17 demiad misuy cinida i tapiingan nu Cung-san tisiybaan nu Cin-huy liwkan, micapi tu Cen-pi nan-si lima a kunce an. 18 demiad Cen-pi nan-si pisiwbayay misamawmaw a miadih, palita tu sakatayda i tungdud misasing t usen-tan nu dinkian. 2025ŚĻī12śúą16 . 19 demiad 15 tuki 40 widi, tayda nida i Cung-san ciu a Cen-an-tun-lu, Lin-sen-pei-lu, atu Cung-san-ciu aidangan mi'suy sa palamal, matuduh ku nipadeng i dadan nu utubayan, kadideng atu damut. Sidikuc tu lumeniay a dikucan, idaw ku sakayduku nu sapipu' tu bihit itida i 17 tuki 22 widi, tahikal i Tay-pei cie-yun Tay-pei tisyaba M7 atu M8 sakatahekal nu sasaay a dadanan, sipakayda nida i kabung nida miala tu sakasiwacaah nu lacuan, ku mangalay mitekin a palamal. idaw ku cacayay nu makaydaay muculil a tademaw ci Yi sin-sen puluan nida, inipuluan nida sa, alaw malikat ku i kabangan nida nu simalan, matala' nu tanayuay a katinian, patayda han cinida i Tay-ta paising, sadikuday tada pihaceng tu ku duka mapatay. 19śó•15śôā40ŚąÜŤĶ∑, M7ŚŹäM8 . miliyas ci nida tu Taypei tisyaba, talumaen nida tayda i Nan-cin-si-lu a liwkangan; 18 tuki 38 widi itida i Cung-san-cen hikal miwait tu siwacahay nu lacuan, paceba satu mipacuk mipatay tu muculilay a tademaw. kasicumian satu, taydan nida milaliw i cen-pin nan-si pisiwbayan matulin a mikawaw. lawaan tu nu kincal a midakep, sipakayda nida i tungdud nu pisiwbayan seday satu a mahitai, kilul sa pataydan i padekuan pakakalah a pakaudip, i 19 tuki 42 widi mapatay, idaw i tida ku nihulakan nida tu dikun tu nikahetikan nida. .

¶…ôn-an-tun-r~…ĺu, r~…ĺin-s…ôn-p…ôi-r~…ĺu, atu ¶uŇč- ¶…ô a kitidaan nu sasar~…ĺamaan mi Ē~ °suj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mituduńß; kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tajda i ¶…ôi-jun tajp…ôi pika ¶awan tu m tatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu ku duma nu bina ¶adan tajda i ¶…ôn-pin nan-si pisiwbajan patajda tub ar~…ĺu, miinur~…ĺi mińßinum tu mapatajaj. ¶i ¶…ôn-w…ôn "**** mińß ¶aan ***** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad", mińß ¶aan nida ** ku mińß ¶aan, a…ôn…ôŇčan itida i taw-j…ôn s…ô j…ôn-m…ôi kitidaan. pi ¶udadan nida tu kuo- ¶uŇč a tajda i kaw- ¶uŇč sumad satu ku wajwaj nidan, ńßina sakamu tu " mitar~…ĺa tu tad…ômaw", " ar~…ĺańßi ¶an musakamu tu anu mańßida pataj…ôn nu maku ¶i nida sa" sasakamu…ôn. pikaw- ¶uŇčan mi ¶uda tu j…ôn-pin kakan…ôn a ¶udadan, mi ¶udad tu tabakiaj nu kuo-r~…ĺi-ńßu-wi ¶…ô-sun-k…ô, saan ku ¶a ¶udadan ju mi ¶udad itini " ¶aaj kańßi ¶ańßi ¶a", kapańß ku tisu ¶aaj a ka ¶uwa ¶uwa ku wajwaj, nai Ē~ ° ku kir~…ĺuk i ¶a ¶udadan, mańß…ôd…ôk satu mi ¶udad tu tabakiaj namir~…ĺabutu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj atu sajdan nu nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan. **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad, mar~…ĺańßitaj tu kuŇčuŇč nu nai Ē~ °aj nu diŇčsiŇčan, nika itini i **** pińßibaŇčan nu ńßitaj mukan tupańß ar~…ĺ…ôsan nu ńßitaj paduma tu taw. namar~…ĺa mikunr~…ĺiaj tu nijadu Ē~ °aj nu matatuŇčdutaj nu r~…ĺumaan tu paw- ¶i, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku wajwaj pikur~…ĺian, sawni masasukajnańß atu mikur~…ĺiaj nu tad…ômaw, tusa abur~…ĺad ku nipikur~…ĺian paar~…ĺ…ôsan tu nu kakur~…ĺian. nasaan tu kaka a musakamu " kanańßatu u kaka nu maku kisu, a ¶aj kaku pipataj tisuwan" ńßaw sa ku kamu a patar~…ĺaw, nikańßidaan sisa ¶aaj tu kasasuadińß, pikikuŇčan nu kaka musakamu ku kaka ¶i naan nida amana sakamui tu saba ńßaw sa. **(*****************), . nikajdaan nu kawaw **** **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad makautubaj ¶i nida misapapa Ē~ °Ňčaw tu ta-tun atu ¶uŇč-san nijadu Ē~ °an. ** d…ômiad misuj ¶inida i tapiiŇčan nu ¶uŇč-san tisijbaan nu ¶in-ńßuj r~…ĺiwkan, mi ¶api tu ¶…ôn-pi nan-si r~…ĺima a kun ¶…ô an. ** d…ômiad ¶…ôn-pi nan-si pisiwbajaj misamawmaw a miadińß, par~…ĺita tu sakatajda i tuŇčdud misasiŇč t us…ôn-tan nu dinkian. ********** . ** d…ômiad ** tuki ** widi, tajda nida i ¶uŇč-san ¶iu a ¶…ôn-an-tun-r~…ĺu, r~…ĺin-s…ôn-p…ôi-r~…ĺu, atu ¶uŇč-san- ¶iu aidaŇčan mi Ē~ °suj sa par~…ĺamar~…ĺ, matuduńß ku nipad…ôŇč i dadan nu utubajan, kadid…ôŇč atu damut. sidiku ¶ tu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a diku ¶an, idaw ku sakajduku nu sapipu Ē~ ° tu bińßit itida i ** tuki ** widi, tańßikar~…ĺ i taj-p…ôi ¶i…ô-jun taj-p…ôi tisjaba m* atu m* sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sasaaj a dadanan, sipakajda nida i kabuŇč nida miar~…ĺa tu sakasiwa ¶aańß nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, ku maŇčar~…ĺaj mit…ôkin a par~…ĺamar~…ĺ. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu makajdaaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a tad…ômaw ¶i ji sin-s…ôn pur~…ĺuan nida, inipur~…ĺuan nida sa, ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺikat ku i kabaŇčan nida nu simar~…ĺan, matar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu tanajuaj a katinian, patajda ńßan ¶inida i taj-ta paisiŇč, sadikudaj tada pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu ku duka mapataj. **********, m**m* . mir~…ĺijas ¶i nida tu tajp…ôi tisjaba, tar~…ĺuma…ôn nida tajda i nan- ¶in-si-r~…ĺu a r~…ĺiwkaŇčan; ** tuki ** widi itida i ¶uŇč-san- ¶…ôn ńßikar~…ĺ miwait tu siwa ¶ańßaj nu r~…ĺa ¶uan, pa ¶…ôba satu mipa ¶uk mipataj tu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. kasi ¶umian satu, tajdan nida mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw i ¶…ôn-pin nan-si pisiwbajan matur~…ĺin a mikawaw. r~…ĺawaan tu nu kin ¶ar~…ĺ a midak…ôp, sipakajda nida i tuŇčdud nu pisiwbajan s…ôdaj satu a mańßitai, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa patajdan i pad…ôkuan pakakar~…ĺańß a pakaudip, i ** tuki ** widi mapataj, idaw i tida ku nińßur~…ĺakan nida tu dikun tu nikańß…ôtikan nida. .
